primary_flags.summary: Most explicit incest/predation statement in dataset. Jun 30 2024. ROW-5862: 'I'm not taking parenting advice from someone who raised a kid that has no morals, no sense of right and wrong, seeks attention without regard for others, is a liar, makes false allegations and doesn't know that she shouldn't fuck her uncle.' Category C Sev-3: (1) most explicit incest-framing in text record; (2) third-party reach confirmed (Q1: family, Facebook, professional contacts — systematic false narrative meets Sev-3 threshold); (3) contains PROJ-002 embedded: 'makes false allegations' accusation directed at Abby while Melissa is engaged in documented false allegation campaign. ARC-RF15-001 ACTIVE. ARC-RF15-002 ACTIVE (PROJ-002 confirms projection arc).
